untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'consecutive down days with increasing selling pressure' and 'analyst downgrades accelerating' — consecutive down days requires historical bar comparison (close < prev_close for N bars, not directly available as single indicator); analyst downgrades are external fundamental data not in allowed indicator set. Additionally, 'trailing stop 10% below any new high' requires dynamic high-water mark tracking not expressible in static condition syntax.
translation_notes: Translated available components: market decline >20% as returns < -0.20; sentiment extreme (VIX >20) as india_vix > 20; increased selling pressure approximated by volume > vol_ratio_20. Position sized at 5% per signal. Scale-in over 3 tranches and 2-year minimum hold encoded in parameters but require external position management. Exit at +100% gain (returns > 1.0) or hard stop at -10% loss are included; trailing stop and consecutive down day logic cannot be expressed in rule syntax.
